series_metadata.series_description: Includes published, numbered versions of the Ohio Homeland Security (OHS) Strategic Plan, developed in accordance with ORC 5502.03 (B)(5) for distribution to agency partners and the general public. Per ORC 149.43, some records in this series are subject to redaction.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: in office files current, six (6) years ; Electronic: on OHS network drive current, six (6) years
